Jaundiced Bone Bracer  
 


Slot: WRIST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 14
Effect: Winter's Roar (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 8.0) at Level 45
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHM
Race: BAR TRL OGR VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Jaundiced Bone Bracer

Slot: WRIST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 14
Effect: Winter's Roar (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 8.0) at Level 45
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHM
Race: BAR TRL OGR VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):220, 220, 160
Stackable:No

Tribute:1404
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 17:45:26
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 20,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 50

still nice
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2003 at 9:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256165839
12 posts
ya see i dont have one of these and i dont think it is nesessary BUT,,, haveing a dd that is manna free could be real nice while soloing no matter how ya look at it ..i have based my equipment on manna regen and health regen for canni and i do extreamlly well no matter what role i play but again i think this item would be sweet as all hell...when i find i am full manna most of the time if i am not healer its good to be able to stay that way like you all said for slowes and back up heal so i feel i gonna have to try to get 1 i would like to be able to at least nuke and stay full manna for when i am really needed....and still be able to shoot hehe fun fun
▲ Page top
Woot frogs added.
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2003 at 7:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1699229791121
Scholar
75 posts
Glad to see SOE added the gimp frogs to the list of equippable races but STILL left out Ikkys. And no matter how you slice it a SLIGHT advantage in AC doesn't even come close to outweighing the advantages of an unlimited mana free 263 DD, especially through hump lvls of 45 - low 50's.

Either add Ikkys or give them a comparable item to offset the advantages of this item. SOE is always talking about balance well lets see some of it cause I can't think of an Ikky Shaman only item that is comparable to this.

# Apr 03 2003 at 6:41 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247350537

i doubt it works at lvl 1 but any 1 got specific level info on when u can start using the trigger effect?

▲ Page top
RE: lvl for the effect?
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2003 at 10:37 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
It procs at lvl 45
▲ Page top
RE: lvl for the effect?
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2003 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966036421
67 posts
Just to clarify-this is NOT a proc. It is a clickable effect. Procs are effects that go off randomly when a weapon is used in combat. A clickable effect is, well, just that, and effect that goes off when you right click the item. This kind of information tends to get the newer players really confused.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 08 2004 at 4:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) A "proc", Process, is for both, some are Combat - Auto, some are Triggered
RE: lvl for the effect?
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2003 at 3:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247350537
19 posts
thnaks :)

▲ Page top
JBB
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2003 at 1:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770675264
36 posts
I have a 59 shammy. He just got a JBB and I plan to try it out on the planes mobs. One thing to note. Winter's Roar only does 263 dmg and is low agro on PoP mobs.. Since most peeps are running with level 55+ buffs and KEI or better. Chain casting the JBB is mearly a way for a shammy to assist the tanks to take the mob down faster with no mana loss.

If I need mana, I can canni 4 mana in nothing flat. I use the lower level frost spells like WR since my mana pool remains so high. I think it will make a difference under many circumstances.

Testing is the only way to know for sure..


▲ Page top
Deady with a horse
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 10:03 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361674561
37 posts
With standing meditation on a horse, don't waste that medding downtime, med AND cast this nuke at the same time! Not sure if this works but i can see why its worth so much if you can cast and med at the same time with this and a horse.

2 posts
Is this item clickable still or has it been changed to random as the info says.
▲ Page top
RE: Bracer
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2003 at 6:51 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
It is still clickable, only weapons can have random effects ( procs ). The JBB is 8.0 sec cast 0.0 recast time 263 DD cold based nuke, unlimited charges.

58 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Chaotic Winds--Venerable Aggrok
▲ Page top
awesome
QuoteReply
# Nov 21 2002 at 3:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769405238
15 posts
Well, let me just say that this item is absolutely the best shammy treat in the game. I have had mine since lvl 45 and I am 58 now...It has saved me so much time, effort and mana. Like anything else, you just have to know how/when to use it. I would never use it in a raid nor seldom if ever in a group...as I am far more valuable as a buffer, de-buffer/backup healer.(Besides, I need the slot for resist gear) But in those times when I need to solo to get xp...or just feel like being alone, tis is a wonderous thing to have! I just bring up my puppy, let him engage a debuffed mob...then happily blast away! Hardly any down time. Worth the plat? YEP
▲ Page top
RE: awesome
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2003 at 7:02 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
You do not need to unequip this to get one more slot of resist gear. Losing 14 AC ( more like 20 modified ) and the right click effect isnt worth putting on a BD bracer IMO. You can get to 120+ points in all 5 resists fairly easily without spending more than 2kpp per piece of gear. I just completed my resist gear shopping spree with only 7kpp, and I manage to get as high as 175 FR 150 MR 140 CR 130 PR and DR BEFORE buffing. You will almost never need more resists than that outside of a high end raid, usually 100-120 resists are enuff. With bard songs and group resist buff 120 resist becomes more like 200-250 anyway, so keep your JBB equipped. After you slow a mob you really should be saving mana for the next one, so you can get in some damage on the mob with this mana free.

58 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Chaotic Winds--Venerable Aggrok
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 18 2002 at 7:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I saw someone try to peddle this off in the Bazaar for 50k. When I looked at the stats, I wondered why. Came here and see that the max price listed is 29k....still way too much for this thing if you ask me. The only advantages I see are the effect and AC...definatly not worth 50k. 10k seems steep to me as well, but it's alot more reasonable than 50.
RE: way too much for this
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2003 at 10:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966315337
14 posts
I usually see this selling in bazaar for 14-15k now, when I originally played (pre-luclin) I bought it for 24k, but now I'm restarting a shammy, so I can't wait to get high enough to use it again. Ohh how I miss the days of clicking the epic and the bracer.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 01 2002 at 7:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I believe creating items that some classes cannot do without was a mistake by verant. Abilities, not items, define classes. Actually kunark has a slew of items like this, like the burnt wooden staff (not sure if that is the right name) for mages or the luminescent staff for druids.
RE: Items
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 1:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361706327
13 posts
You're totally mixed up here.

Verant did not make any items that a class cannot do without. The mindless lemming-type Shaman who simply does as "everyone else" does is the one who creates this silly perception.

The "essential" nature of the JBB is purely subjective, created and fostered by Shaman without imagination.

Players have created the moronic illusion that every Shaman needs a JBB, not Verant.

The same can be said about every example you have cited, among the corresponding classes.

Edited, Mon Nov 11 13:37:25 2002
▲ Page top
/agree
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 2:06 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
My lvl 54 Shaman never had a JBB, and shockingly was still able to progress, fight, and contribute to a team. I can cast an Ice nuke about 4x stronger than the JBB. Frankly, I'd rather meditate with the time I would have spent casting with this item (it's not a quick cast).

The Shaman is one of the more complex classes, we have lots of diffent abilities and our role varies depending on who we are grouped with. Sprinkling the MoB with snowflakes when you should be slowing it instead is not wise. Use your imagination, adapt to your circumstances. Try fighting Ice Gaints with a JBB, and you'll suddenly realize you may have negelected learning other strategies.

The JBB is a favorite for lvl 45-50 Shamen who like to solo. I don't like soloing, I think as a Shaman I am MUCH more effective in a group, and I really don't like the idea of lvl 45 Shamen depending on an item that drops in a lvl 55-60 dungeon. Like a lot of dropped items, by the time you can actually get it by hunting, you don't need it anymore.
▲ Page top
RE: /agree
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2003 at 1:04 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593362170110
View User Forum
10 posts
I am a 58 level shaman with a horse and the JBB so I med and pound on mobs with the bracer at the same time. I have yet to find a group that after slowing the mob and any other chores needed mind my putting an additional 1-2k or more damage on the mob. After most fights I am at or near full mana and have done more than just slow and med. Believe me a horse and the JBB are two of the greatest goodies we can buy.
▲ Page top
RE: /agree
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2003 at 4:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591785346292
12 posts
With a mount horse/dino this item is god item
for shammies. I dont use this item when i solo
really because nuking breaks root too much. I
just through some dots on an let doggy go to
work. In groups, this item owns, you can chain
nuke from your mount while you mending up from
slows ,buffing or heal. PoP mobs usally take 2 mins or so to kill, so i right click about
13-15 times doing around 3945hp of damage without mana cost per each mob. Unless there
is a wizzy/mage in your group, you will outdamage
everyone else(individually) in your party. But your wizzy/mages got med every other mob , you dont, just keep firing. The is the best item a shammy can make use of, even more so than the shammie epic. And you can use it till 65th lvl.

7 posts
Can this camp be soloed? 60 shaman,epic,torpor and the needed buff like aego and kei.i dont think it worth buying this item at lvl 60, this camp would be awesome loot if i can solo it and kill the 4 PH and the roamer in the like 27 min of seb respawn.
▲ Page top
Iksar alternative
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2002 at 2:10 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591779392586
Scholar
114 posts
I get a kick out of the posts on various items why can't i use this or i deserve that. If all race/class combos could use everything we would all be the same or pretty damn close. The variation in this game is what addicts me.

So we lizards have yet another challange to overcome. OK, so you won't get the exact same effect but you can make evoction your primary specialization and get a mana preservation item. Obviously not quite as efficient but this effect is that important, this better than nuthin.

I like playing Iksar shammy, we have some unique abilities and good starting stats. Sure i cried for a few seconds when i couldn't find Iksar in the race list (that erudite shammy sure will like it) but i'll just find another item or technique that will get all those barbs (sam) saying i wish i made an iksar.

These going around 40K on Antonius Bayle
And for 10K on Luclin Server
Casting time is 8sec, so you miss a full tick of meditateing, unles you buy a horse that is 10K, you can chain cast with JBB, and your mana is going up just like you sit on your *** and you avoiid aggro by sitting on the ground.
To obtain full benefit buy a horse+JBB
